title: Traditional Norwegian Beef Stew
description: A hearty beef stew originating from Norway, made with tender cuts of beef and root vegetables. This comfort food is perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add the beef broth and red wine to the pot, stirring to combine.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
